Over summer 2001, conducted eight discussion groups with Detroit residents focussed stress.
order understand variety ways people experience deal with stress, focus groups were held three different Detroit communities, there were separate groups women different ethnic backgrounds.
purpose groups gather information about particular kinds things that stress people that live Detroit, they respond stress, they think affects their health they cope with stress.
information from these focus groups used guide questions included Wave community survey (2002-2003) described article, Engaging Urban Residents Assessing Neighborhood Environments Their Implications Health.
2006 conducted series eight focus groups with Detroit residents better understand ways that neighborhoods impact physical activity, foods eaten community residents, other factors associated with risk heart disease.
focus groups were conducted eastside Detroit, northwest Detroit, four southwest Detroit (two southwest focus groups were conducted English Spanish).
Each focus groups approximately half hours duration between participants.
Participants were asked discuss places that community residents various kinds physical activities around their neighborhoods, kinds food people have available them their neighborhoods.
They were asked particular about their thoughts paved trails pathways that being developed several Detroit neighborhoods provide spaces physical activity among neighborhood residents.
Findings from these focus groups were used Greenway reports that analyzed Greenways eastside, northwest southwest Detroit working with community residents organizations develop interventions promote physical activity Detroit neighborhoods.
Finally, results from these focus groups being used collaboration with community based organizations, community residents others identify changes built environment (trails, pathways, parks, etc.)
that encourage residents more physically active develop other community level strategies improve heart health residents eastside, northwest, southwest Detroit.
